prose:
A Fukui reactivity analysis of benzaldehyde was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` level (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) with PySCF as the backend. The calculation was performed in the gas phase on the geometry provided in `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz`, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The SCF converged successfully.

The Fukui indices, which describe reactivity towards electrophilic (f+), nucleophilic (f-), and radical (f0) attacks, and the dual descriptor (DD) are reported below for each atom. The partial charges were calculated using the Mulliken scheme.

**Fukui Indices:**
| Atom (1-based) | Symbol | f+ (electrophilic) | f- (nucleophilic) | f0 (radical) | Dual Descriptor |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | O | 0.37884 | 0.23840 | 0.30862 | 0.14045 |
| 2 | C | -0.35167 | -0.00705 | -0.17936 | -0.34462 |
| 3 | C | 0.39939 | 0.03675 | 0.21807 | 0.36264 |
| 4 | C | 0.21162 | 0.08332 | 0.14747 | 0.12830 |
| 5 | C | 0.33722 | 0.05371 | 0.19546 | 0.28351 |
| 6 | C | 0.28476 | -0.00232 | 0.14122 | 0.28708 |
| 7 | C | 0.27923 | 0.05825 | 0.16874 | 0.22098 |
| 8 | C | 0.35871 | 0.08235 | 0.22053 | 0.27636 |
| 9 | H | -0.11586 | 0.06031 | -0.02777 | -0.17618 |
| 10 | H | -0.20261 | 0.05869 | -0.07196 | -0.26129 |
| 11 | H | -0.12696 | 0.07420 | -0.02638 | -0.20116 |
| 12 | H | -0.13404 | 0.06601 | -0.03401 | -0.20005 |
| 13 | H | -0.13691 | 0.07154 | -0.03268 | -0.20845 |
| 14 | H | -0.18173 | 0.12583 | -0.02795 | -0.30756 |

**Most Reactive Sites:**
*   **Most electrophilic atom (highest f+):** Atom 3 (Carbon), f+ = 0.39939
*   **Most nucleophilic atom (highest f-):** Atom 1 (Oxygen), f- = 0.23840

The full output can be found in `benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity.json`. The live log for this calculation was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0q7i8cxj/live.json`.
